channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Korean startup Wrtn is on track to pass $100M in annual recurring revenue, riding a loneliness-epidemic-fueled boom in AI entertainment
item.description: Chief product officer Dong-jae Lee uses the analogy of a dungeon master for a tabletop RPG: The AI constructs a narrative in response to user choices.
